overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from covered plazas through open urban spaces and dark walkways, passing by holographic billboards, palm trees, and scattered pedestrians in a high-tech downtown environment.

events.description: entering covered pedestrian plaza from open street
slight right turn while navigating the plaza walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the urban plaza entrance, observing the neon advertisements and futuristic architecture

large horizontal billboard with red text reading GIRRS and FEEL FREE

green neon sign with the word CARBON visible on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through the entrance of a covered urban plaza at night, passing by a large billboard featuring a woman with a weapon and various neon signs. The ground is wet and reflective, with scattered debris and a fire hydrant visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with central building and palm trees

passing palm trees and ground-level digital advertising screens

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, looking around at the central building and surrounding digital advertisements

tall palm trees with green foliage lining the left side of the plaza
purple neon sign on the central building facade
low digital advertising screens at ground level displaying various content

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open plaza featuring a prominent central building with a concrete facade and purple neon signage. Palm trees line the left side while various digital billboards and ground-level advertisements surround the area, with the night sky visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering dark covered walkway with overhead fluorescent tube lights
passing woman in yellow dress walking in opposite direction

small blue booth structure with purple neon trim and OPEN sign
low concrete ceiling of the covered pedestrian passage
bright white fluorescent tube lighting fixtures mounted on the right wall
modern building exterior with vertical glass panels and yellow interior lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dark, enclosed pedestrian walkway illuminated by harsh fluorescent tube lights. A large 'Real Water' billboard is visible at the far end, and the walkway features a modern glass building facade on the right side with a small blue kiosk nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with vehicle traffic and neon billboards

events.description: exiting dark walkway onto open street with vehicle traffic
cars driving past on the wet asphalt road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the sidewalk, observing the traffic and neon advertisements

vertical billboard featuring a cartoon clown mascot and ALL FOODS text
wet asphalt road with red and yellow lane markings
large digital billboard with purple neon border displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway onto a city street with active vehicle traffic. The scene features an industrial building with large ventilation grills on the left, a fast food billboard with a clown mascot on the right, and a prominent purple neon billboard visible along the sidewalk.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and observing the vibrant neon advertisements

metal railing along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a neon-lit downtown sidewalk with large digital billboards displaying vibrant anime-style advertisements. The street features moderate pedestrian traffic walking in the same direction, with futuristic glass buildings and glowing signage lining the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from a sheltered plaza into the bustling heart of a downtown district. It begins by passing a large billboard of a woman with a weapon and reflective wet pavement, before the space opens into a wide plaza characterized by purple neon signage and lining palm trees. The camera then shifts from the open air into a dark, enclosed pedestrian walkway illuminated by harsh fluorescent tubes and a distant Real Water advertisement. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the environment transitions into a busy city street with active vehicle traffic and industrial ventilation grills, passing a clown-themed fast food billboard. Finally, the scene expands onto a vibrant downtown sidewalk where the camera moves alongside other pedestrians past towering glass buildings and glowing anime-style digital displays.
